{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005704E2835AF780068EC4AD3C"}"},"total":533},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7527213144687625022","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"……
说不完这人间沧桑
道不尽生死笑忘
尘世里万千的荣光
总有诉不完的衷肠
话不尽这千古流芳
言不止余音绕梁
故事里留下的思量
总让人向往
昨日的史诗，还残留些波澜
……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752566045,"group_id":"7506805787059047449","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4152219465167111"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506805787059047449","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"82"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":12056,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54399,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7526927890375934782","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"峥嵘岁月，血染山河。还原历史，正视历史，真实再现。
在黑暗的人间炼狱时期，在民族大义面前，先辈们都是可歌可泣英雄好汉。角涩鲜活啊！
民众在被没得年代选择裹挟前行中，每个人却都在做出自己选择。在无奈中呐喊，在泥泞血水中拼杀。
小说写得回肠荡气，令人潸然泪下。
好书！！！
已关注作者李晓敏。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752503281,"group_id":"7506805787059047449","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"分享“假作真时真亦假，无为有处有还无。”心得","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1IeFNimHUI+KFag/xnZWrntKG/nDF4WwsHVprF7aSYn","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/59ab0106adaa42ff96146a298e30b8c2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776882511&x-signature=rJvVNV7Irhq0WVOU%2BWsumWHoniQ%3D","user_id":"4152219465167111","user_name":"太虚难得孤境"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4152219465167111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506805787059047449","book_info":{"abstract":"同名影视剧《遍地狼烟》，由杨烁、黄曼、郭明翔、周一围、王子睿、周扬等主演。
山村少年牧良逢本是猎户人家的孩子，天生擅长枪支运用，枪法奇准。
一个阴差阳错的机会，他开枪击伤了一位欺压寡妇的国军军官，从而踏上了与日寇厮杀的征途：潜入沦陷区刺杀汉奸。与鬼子狙击手的生死较量，配合新四军摧毁鬼子小型兵工厂和印钞厂，收编土匪解救战俘……
一群中国好男儿演绎了一场充满血性的抗战史诗！超好看的“狙击手”题材小说！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/460e354d85574fd3b4bba084645bba94~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"李晓敏","author_id":"","book_id":"7506805787059047449","book_name":"遍地狼烟","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"59万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":45,"name":"影视小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45&name=影视小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":991,"name":"国内影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=991&name=国内影视&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7519735175253609497","read_count":"1298","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"491762"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"62","tags":"影视小说,国内影视","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/460e354d85574fd3b4bba084645bba94~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779469025&x-signature=GeZZ1dQ9LBhfqPEhF2Zjk8Y51o8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"79"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324005704E2835AF780068EC4AD3C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":33,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11096,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":52281,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":9186},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7550178284234703641","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"该篇小说充满了爱国主义情怀和对日寇在中国犯下的滔天罪行的愤恨，书中主人翁的故事情节生动形象，富有血性，写出了中国抗日军民奋勇杀敌，保家卫国的不屈不饶精神。故事曲折离奇，富有传奇色彩。语言表述得体，场景宏大，每一篇章节给人印象深刻，感人肺腑，好多次我都会流下泪来。或许是我老了，容易激动，但不得不承认，这样感人至深的场景无时无刻不在打动着我，无法不为它流出感动的泪。虽然故事结局有些仓促，但我理解作者的用意，这也是艺术的魅力！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757917019,"group_id":"7506805787059047449","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小时候很想读书，没得读。看着别的小朋友看小人书很是眼馋。父亲只给我买过三本小人书，都是英雄人物故事。可看到别的小孩儿看的都是《三国演义》《水浒传》等名著画书心里那种渴望真是无以言表。书真就是精神食粮！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5FkhtJ2CkxK6aOHAvg9hZY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"232720193816988","user_name":"飞鸿飘零"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"232720193816988","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506805787059047449","book_info":{"abstract":"同名影视剧《遍地狼烟》，由杨烁、黄曼、郭明翔、周一围、王子睿、周扬等主演。
山村少年牧良逢本是猎户人家的孩子，天生擅长枪支运用，枪法奇准。
